parameters.content: Connector template for Canvas (generic bridge)::sync_artifact_stub. Fill placeholder env vars before execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{"service_name":"canvas","display_name":"Canvas (generic bridge)","operation_id":"sync_artifact_stub","method":"POST","base_url":"{$env.CANVAS_BASE_URL}","path":"/v1/workspaces/__CANVAS_ACCOUNT_ID__/artifacts","url":"{$env.CANVAS_BASE_URL}/v1/workspaces/__CANVAS_ACCOUNT_ID__/artifacts","headers":{"Authorization":"Bearer {$env.CANVAS_ACCESS_TOKEN}"},"body":{},"query":{},"integration_mode":"manual_bridge","status":"placeholder_only","credential_placeholders":["CANVAS_BASE_URL","CANVAS_ACCESS_TOKEN","CANVAS_ACCOUNT_ID"],"notes":"Generic Canvas bridge placeholder because \"Canvas\" may refer to different products in different stacks."}}];
return [{json:{status:'placeholder_only', service:$json.service_name, operation:$json.operation_id, integration_mode:$json.integration_mode, body:$json.body, notes:$json.notes}}];
